staticFirstPolicy.summary: All core city, boundary, TOP100, and household data must be bundled as static assets. No live data service is required for the app experience.

approvedSources.name: 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 SHP
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; never client runtime fetch
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: 공공데이터포털 page lists 무료 and 이용허락범위 제한 없음; verify and preserve snapshot-specific metadata when derived geometry is committed.

approvedSources.name: VWorld 법정경계 SHP download surfaces
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; simplify before bundling
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Use only when the selected dataset's current license permits bundled derived visualization with attribution.

capitals.inclusionRule: Bundle sovereign-state capital candidates with coordinates and a safe HTTPS Wikipedia or source URL; generated data must exceed the legacy 33 curated entries.

approvedSources.name: Wikidata Query Service country/capital/coordinate candidates
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; no client runtime query
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Record the SPARQL query, extraction date, and Wikidata/linked-page attribution notes in the generated dataset metadata.

top100Cities.metric: international arrivals by city, 2017 current ranking
top100Cities.fallbackDecision: Use the complete public Euromonitor Top 100 City Destinations 2018 white paper for exact-100 static rows. Mastercard GDCI 2019 remains a top-20-only corroborating source and must not be used to infer ranks 21-100.

approvedSources.name: Euromonitor Top 100 City Destinations 2018
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time static transcription with source metadata; no runtime dependency
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Public white paper ranking used as factual source for the exact-100 static city list; do not bundle report prose or imagery.

rejectedSources.reason: Public Agoda materials are partial/promotional and do not provide a legally complete global top-100 dataset for this static app.
Public Mastercard GDCI 2019 report exposes top-20 detail only, so it cannot validate exact ranks 21-100.
Any source page that does not expose the complete ranking table is insufficient for exact 100 bundled rows.

validationContract.cityDataVerifier: scripts/verify-city-data.mjs must validate capital count > 33, TOP100 exact count 100, ranks 1-100, coordinates, unique ids, HTTPS links, and dataset source metadata.
validationContract.boundaryVerifier: scripts/verify-boundary-data.mjs must validate Korea boundary sourceClassification, official 17-region contract or documented source-metadata exception, household target coverage, provenance exclusions, and no live map/API requirement.
